pages.title: Best Pre-Workout Supplements in India (2026)
pages.meta: Best pre-workout supplements in India 2026 — 12 products tested. Caffeine doses, citrulline content, FSSAI status, and Amazon India availability. INR pricing for all picks.

products.name: ON Gold Standard Pre-Workout
products.blurb: Jake's take: Best combination of availability, quality, and moderate stimulation available on Amazon India. Not the most clinically dosed but honest labelling and trusted brand.
pros: 175mg natural caffeine — moderate, daily-use dose3g Creapure® creatine per servingAll doses disclosed — no proprietary blendBest quality pre-workout widely available on Amazon India

products.name: Transparent Labs BULK
products.blurb: Jake's take: Best fully-dosed pre-workout available with India shipping. Costs more (₹3,500-4,000/month via import) but delivers clinical doses where ON GS Pre doesn't.
pros: 8g L-Citrulline (clinical pump dose)3.2g Beta-Alanine (clinical dose)250mg natural caffeineShips internationally to India

products.name: MuscleBlaze PRE Workout
products.blurb: Jake's take: India's best domestically-available pre-workout. Beta-alanine is at clinical dose. Citrulline is underdosed (typical for India market) but caffeine and B-alanine deliver for most users.
pros: 200mg caffeine from natural sources3g Beta-Alanine — at clinical doseFSSAI Certified domestic brandBest pre-workout value in India

pages.title: Best Protein Supplements in India (2026)
pages.meta: Best protein supplements in India 2026 — 18 products tested. MuscleBlaze, ON, AS-IT-IS, Dymatize ranked with INR pricing, FSSAI status, cost per gram of protein, and Amazon India buy links.

products.name: MuscleBlaze Biozyme Performance Whey
products.blurb: Jake's take: India's best whey protein. The EAF enzyme complex genuinely improves absorption in the Indian gut microbiome context. Unbeatable at ₹2,799/kg.
pros: 25g protein · EAF Enhanced Absorption FormulaFSSAI Certified — domestic brand qualityBest price/quality ratio in IndiaWidely available across Amazon India

products.name: ON Gold Standard 100% Whey
products.blurb: Jake's take: The global benchmark. Premium price in India (~₹3,499/kg) but unmatched quality assurance. Best international protein available on Amazon India.
pros: 24g protein · WPI-first blendInformed Sport certifiedWorld's #1 selling protein powderAvailable on Amazon India

products.name: AS-IT-IS Whey Protein Concentrate
products.blurb: Jake's take: Unflavoured, no-nonsense WPC at the lowest cost per gram of protein you'll find from a trusted brand in India. Ideal for budget-conscious buyers who mix with food.
pros: 24g protein per serving · UnflavouredNo added sugar, no artificial coloursFSSAI Certified · Transparent labelBest cost-per-gram in India

pages.title: Best Vitamins & Minerals in India (2026)
pages.meta: Best vitamins and minerals for Indians in 2026 — Vitamin D3, Vitamin B12, Iron, Omega-3, Zinc and multivitamins ranked with INR pricing, FSSAI status, and Amazon India availability.

products.name: TrueBasics Vitamin D3 + K2
products.blurb: Jake's take: Vitamin D3 at 5,000 IU with K2 (MK-7) is the single most impactful supplement for most Indians. TrueBasics is the best domestic option — FSSAI certified, correct dose, with K2 for calcium
pros: 5,000 IU Vitamin D3 per capsuleVitamin K2 (MK-7) for calcium directionFSSAI Certified Indian brandMost critical deficiency correction for Indians

products.name: HealthKart HK Vitals B12
products.blurb: Jake's take: B12 deficiency is critically common in vegetarian Indians. Methylcobalamin form is superior for neurological function. HealthKart's dosing and FSSAI certification make this the go-to dome
pros: Methylcobalamin form (better than cyanocobalamin)1,500mcg per capsule — effective for correctionFSSAI CertifiedMost important supplement for vegetarian Indians

products.name: Himalayan Organics Omega-3
products.blurb: Jake's take: Most Indian diets are severely deficient in EPA and DHA. Himalayan Organics delivers a meaningful EPA+DHA dose at an excellent price with FSSAI certification.
pros: 1,000mg fish oil per capsule — 330mg EPA + 220mg DHAMolecularly distilled for purityFSSAI CertifiedBest value omega-3 from Indian brand
